sections.paragraph: (Milêl), m. this, Gen 24:65 37:19 . Compounded of זֶה and the fuller form of the article הַל, the ל being doubled as in the cognate אֵל, אֵלֶּה. [“According to Hupfeld from זֶה and הַלָּא = הָ֫לְאָה which is also favoured by the Talm. plur. הַלָּלוּ for הַלָּא אֵלִּוּ.”] It answers to the Arabic أَلَّذِى which assumes the power of a relative; hence is the shortened form הַלָּז أَلَّذْ, and by aphæresis لذى.
